name: rollback-workflow
description: Rollback workflow for reverting failed deployments to previous known-good state

steps.name: Detect Deployment Failure
steps.description: Identify failed deployment from verification report or manual trigger

steps.name: Backup Current State
steps.description: Archive current deployment state before rollback for comparison

steps.name: Revert Vercel Deployment
steps.description: Revert Vercel project to last successful deployment via API

steps.name: Verify Rollback Success
steps.description: Confirm reverted deployment is LIVE, HTTPS valid, homepage accessible

steps.name: Archive Rollback Report
steps.description: Document rollback event in delivery report archive
